blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,030 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 44°F.
Wednesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
